title: GGUF Phi LLM Model Spec
description: GGUF model specification for Phi-family language models.
documentation:
## Purpose
Combines the GGUF backend tag with the Phi family tag, fully resolving the model to a GGUF Phi instruct model. The runtime applies both the correct GGUF loading path and the `<|user|>` / `<|end|>` chat template.

## When to use
This URN is assigned by the ValueAdapter after inspecting a GGUF model file and confirming it is a Phi-family model. Use it in cap selectors to match only GGUF Phi models.

## Notes
This is a composed tag produced at runtime; it is not typically specified manually by users.
